utterances.speaker: Carol
utterances.text: Hey , what are you doing here ?

utterances.text: Well , oh just ah , I was just wondering , when you and I split up , did you get the tape that was half the last episode of

utterances.text: Ah yeah , but now it is Susan and me in Mexico and the hostages coming home .
